description:
Colored noise & ambient sounds for focus, sleep, and calm. No ads, no tracking.
Metiq plays high-quality colored noise and natural ambient sounds to help you focus, fall asleep, or block out the world.

Open it, tap, listen. That's the whole app.

Colored noise
• Pink — softer than white, great for sleep and reading.
• Brown — deep and warm, good for focus and tinnitus relief.
• White — classic, masks sudden sounds.
• Grey — perceptually flat, designed to feel even across the spectrum.

Ambient sounds
• Sea waves, thunderstorm, fire crackling, birds chirping, and café ambience.
• Start from a preset, or blend sounds into your own mix and set each level.

Features
• Four colored noises and five ambient sounds, looped seamlessly.
• Layer and mix ambient sounds, with quick presets.
• Sleep timer with quick presets and custom hours/minutes/seconds.
• Media-session integration: control playback from your lock screen, notification, or Bluetooth headset.
• Works fully offline. Audio is bundled — no streaming, no account, no internet permission.
• No ads. No tracking. No analytics. No third-party SDKs.
• Tiny footprint, minimal battery use.

Open source under GPL v3. Source code on GitHub: https://github.com/metiq-xyz/android-app
